name: claude-skills
description: S-Tier Staff Researcher — skills that help you operate at staff-researcher level. Proper workflows for polishing raw ideas, expressing them rigorously, and implementing them properly. Covers RPI (Research→Plan→Implement with Codex peer review), rigorous LaTeX authoring and review, paper refinement, TikZ/pgfplots figure cleanup, and pedagogical lecture enhancement.

plugins.name: rpi-workflow
plugins.description: Research → Plan → Implement workflow with Codex architectural peer review. Research the codebase with parallel Explore agents, write a plan, get an adversarial review from Codex, then implement. All artifacts land in docs/. The engineering flagship — refuses to vibe-code.

plugins.name: rigorous-paper-author
plugins.description: Draft or revise a mathematically rigorous LaTeX paper for theory-heavy ML, scientific computing, numerical analysis, control, geometry, or applied mathematics. Enforces claim graphs, notation ledgers, theorem discipline, and numerical-analysis rigor before you write a sentence.

plugins.name: rigorous-paper-reviewer
plugins.description: Deep 7-pass technical review of a LaTeX paper — structure, notation, theorem/proof, numerics, complexity, figures, coherence. Includes a static Python verifier for automated triage of labels, cross-references, and structure.

plugins.name: refining-ml-papers
plugins.description: Revise ML/scientific LaTeX papers based on reviewer or advisor feedback. Structural reorganization, concrete instantiations of abstract tables, cross-file deduplication, compilation verification after every change.

plugins.name: enhancing-latex-lectures
plugins.description: Feynman-test partner for lecture notes. Pattern-matches against exemplary pedagogical material (e.g. Todorov's PDFs) and adds stunning visualizations, concrete-to-abstract progressions, and insight boxes. Making a concept teachable is how you discover whether you understand it.

plugins.name: tikz-figure-review
plugins.description: Review and fix alignment, label collision, clipping, legend-over-data, and overlap issues in TikZ/pgfplots figures inside LaTeX documents. Covers 11 failure modes with canonical fixes plus an extract-standalone iteration loop.
